typeLine: Alchemist's Quicksilver Flask of the Armadillo

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Oblivion Cry
explicitMods: +38% to Fire Damage over Time Multiplier

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, causing them to be debilitated when they hit enemies and increasing damage they take while on low life.
explicitMods: Cursed Enemies take 60% increased Damage while on Low Life
Cursed Enemies are Debilitated for 3.00 Seconds when they Hit
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that reserve life or mana to create auras around you.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 25% increased Aura effect

Supported Skills also count as Blessing Skills
You can only have one Aura on you from your Blessing Skills
Your Non-Blessing Skills which Reserve Mana are Disabled while you have an Aura from a Supported Skill on you
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that multiplies damage over time and increases skill effect duration of you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies deal 20% more Damage over Time
You and nearby allies have 20% increased Skill Effect Duration
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Defiance of Destiny
explicitMods: Gain 26% of Missing Unreserved Life before being Hit by an Enemy
flavourText: The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

name: Foulborn Rathpith Globe
explicitMods: Sacrifice 10% of your Life when you Use or Trigger a Spell Skill
5% increased Spell Damage per 100 Player Maximum Life
mutatedMods: Deal 5% increased Damage Over Time per 100 Player Maximum Life
flavourText: The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants Elusive and a buff that grants Phasing. While you have this buff, monsters that enter an area around you will be Withered. explicitMods:
Cannot be Cast or Triggered while Elusive
Grants Elusive
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
40% increased Effect of Elusive from this Skill
Inflicts 9 Withered Debuffs the first time each Enemy enters the Area
